textByHashes.ea32ed3f7edb71938ca7d5f2e5760dc3230d7094: You've found one here. Can I help you?
textByHashes.b5d0cdc019c324dccdd14803cd7cd5e23ddeb17f: Well, I don't know of any suspicious people... Advisor Ghrim can be rather paranoid about these things sometimes.
textByHashes.fb8d36ff27dd66c551077c2d525d4b63b52a5478: Nobody apart from you, and those kids from Rellekka.
textByHashes.9f746686fbbb2d76a096edd81fad4b23f49bc2d2: Five of them came over here a few weeks ago. They said they were here to see relatives in the dungeons, and they were visiting from the mainland.
textByHashes.8c7db9737b6c1f247505990524d6c91bc84aa9dc: They've not been used to keep prisoners for a long time. But since the war ended, we've had more people visiting the island.
textByHashes.8d1a12f2c9f21206f23ee492918bc8428f6d3f00: Some of them decided they wanted to stay, so we've had to find somewhere for them to live...
textByHashes.7ab2abf1e0373521b6f5bf0dd7f11ad10d6b7149: Only the weather on Miscellania is terrible, and nobody could build houses that would stand up to a strong wind. Etceteria is just the same.
textByHashes.ec46e5a0586090ddc20b7047cef3ec881040e4b2: Well, of course, they had to be enlarged first. There are still some dwarves working there, making more of the dungeons inhabitable before they move over to work in Etceteria.
textByHashes.27db1a7383f2b5a319ad4f11cd79d1295ed6d251: If you're looking for those kids from Rellekka, you'll find them in those dungeons.
textByHashes.7675f501d42e10420ccaea0d466fc6a5326b5b40: Why are you surprised about this, though? I thought you'd become the Regent.
textByHashes.f7b03bb58b3d791435a2dc9fcfb37e487c8f879b: You're lucky you're needed there. Just don't speak to me on the journey!
textByHashes.63c2ae4b9a394df8d85135995317fc1b82dc5cf2: You're lucky you're needed on Miscellania exile. Just don't speak to me on the journey!
textByHashes.85e5ff30e76a3169037214955c99f2e4893a978d: Fine. I won't pretend to like it though.
textByHashes.267c91a881c8e7f1a8a6a816680f66b91854c930: Let's go exile. Sooner you're off my ship the better.
textByHashes.293762da87586f6739100552e1bce5327f746b71: Ah! Even the outerlanders have heard of my mysterious flower! I found it in a country far far away from here!
textByHashes.18830eec5081c9872bf3140b84b8ac010ac06542: I'm afraid not, outerlander. There is a woman in this village whose heart I seek to capture, and I think giving her this strange flower might be my best bet with her.
textByHashes.c5a00f1e468d5f6bcb6d5b8e14e8fb1b03dabf28: Hmm... that is not a totally stupid idea outerlander. I know she is a lover of music, and a romantic ballad might be just the thing with which to woo her.
textByHashes.44c57b2fbc004f813d88d7b247e537cb5a4e4197: Unfortunately I don't have a musical bone in my entire body, so someone else will have to write it for me.
textByHashes.7fa27b7d3e7b8f3ac19cddb53b5faf009f044953: That sounds like a fair deal to me, outerlander.
textByHashes.5256c0faf80c492dfd3918e2f2e8ed1f3e4cbedc: Oh. It's by Olaf? Hmm. Well, a deal's a deal. I just hope it's better than the usual rubbish he comes up with, or my chances are worse than ever.
textByHashes.63187f40e089416d5a7a25844b2034a8c6edd3fb: It's Thora, the longhall barkeep. Please don't tell her though. She's not like the rest of the Fremennik girls, she has a secret desire to see the world.
textByHashes.da6c9bafb08c42f6796da9f7f4facc24c58fd54e: Being a sailor, I can really relate to that.
textByHashes.d938feeed0e3a325d8a331d3c916a10207cf3e3e: Not too bad, but there's still a lot that needs doing today.
textByHashes.7370b5ef4599a9bf636e3b4beb55f64d07698fca: Hello! Nice day to be out at sea!
textByHashes.b9d202912aa4069a8698aeddf3cdbe4230e59a72: Ahoy there! Ye best talk t' the Captain, she'll get ye up t' speed on the moist beastie ye'll be facin'!
textByHashes.1e3ec892b4feb8a871c748b260f5c9e9e25ab2cd: Arr! Watch fer the Captain's orders - she'll 'ave us underway in two shakes of a marlinspike.
textByHashes.3248adba2b7f08d1afa4edebe05e0174a318c9ee: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
textByHashes.e6c2f6b1f162bbac8ebdcf50367fc8a635df5538: Okay, but it will be better once we're back on board.
textByHashes.b5f7fefa94b50cc14b23caf9d03743612b8a5d0b: Sorry, but I have lots of work to do before we head back out to sea.
textByHashes.eaec929b203fcb43087f4929ed0ffe1bbed4d735: Well I could do with a good rest, but fine otherwise.
textByHashes.453b9178e9dd5ad2787fa08881ea9f7d03f02e9e: Don't talk to me outerlander. I need to fix this longboat. Go talk to the chieftain.
textByHashes.ec30edb12a0ff719dd7994df87223d2228fe23c1: Hello again, brother . If you're ready to jump aboard, we're all ready to set sail with the tide!
textByHashes.325a8aa67aff4c9bc53cb629a4e9969d7415d3a1: Hello again, sister . If you're ready to jump aboard, we're all ready to set sail with the tide!
